message:
test(e2e): harden theme helpers against Turbopack streaming stalls

Replace reload-based theme application with single-navigation approach
in gotoWithTheme (set localStorage + CSS class atomically via evaluate).
Rewrite clickThemeToggle to cycle themes via localStorage instead of
unreliable button clicks on partially-hydrated DOM. Add
waitForThemeStateSynced helper and debug-theme spec.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
